title: Ottiyanam Senji Tharen Song Lyrics Arul
stanzas: <div>Ottiyanam Senji Tharen Song Lyrics Arul

Ottiyaanam senji thaaren vaariya
naan otti kolla
enakonjam thaariyaa

ottiyaanam kittiyaanam thevaya
idai kattikolla kai rendu illaiyaa

mookku muzhi ullavale
muthathirukku nallavale
maaralavu naan eduthu
muthu maalai tharavaa

muchathila ullavavae
machamulla manmathane
maaralvu edukkayila
nee oralavu thodavaa

velli kodame
thanga vadame
indha chiyaan pakkam
thirumbu

sandhu kedachaa
vandu adippa
idhu coimbatore kurumbu

Ottiyaanam senji thaaren vaariya
naan otti kolla
enakonjam thaariyaa

ottiyaanam kittiyaanam thevaya
idai kattikolla kai rendu illaiyaa

Suththa thangam pathavachi
natchathira kalluvachi
nethti suthti pannithaaren
nee suththi vaariyaa

nethi sutti thevayilla
neela kallum thevayilla
nethiyila kungumatha
nee vachivida vaariyaa

un kaththi mookkoda
muthu mookkuthi
kuthivida poren variyaa

un mutha mookkuthi
uppukkaagaathu
mookkil mookorasa variyaa

thangathodu naathaaren
angathodu nee variyaa
thodu podum kaathodu
mugoortha thaethi sollaiyaa

Ottiyaanam senji thaaren vaariya
naan otti kolla
enakonjam thaariyaa

ottiyaanam kittiyaanam thevaya
idai kattikolla kai rendu illaiyaa

Velli katti vetti thatti
sillu sillu mani katti
kolusuga pannithaaren
nee kooda maada vaariyaa

koodamaada vaarathukku
kolusuga thaevayilla
nee genda kaalil nandu pola
un sundu viral thaeyumaiyyaa

adi vanji un kaiyyil
konji vilaiyaada valayal
naan thaaren variyaa

ada valaiyal vendaame
ippa varuvene
vazhathu kai konjam thariyaa

thanga chainu naan thaaren
thammaa thundu nee thariyaa
manja kairu nee thanthaa
enna uruchi thaarenyaa

ottiyaan ottiyaanam ottiyaanam
atha senjithaaren
senjithaaren vaariyaa

danda nakka danda nakka
danda nakkaa
idai katti kolla kai rendu illaiyaa

mookku muzhi ullavale
muthathirukku nallavale
maaralavu naan eduthu
muthu maalai tharavaa

muchathila ullavavae
machamulla manmathane
maaralvu edukkayila
nee oralavu thodavaa

velli kodame
thanga vadame
indha chiyaan pakkam
thirumbu

sandhu kedachaa
vandu adippa
ingu venaam
venaam kurumbu.

seo.title: Ottiyanam Senji Tharen Song Lyrics Arul

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ottiyanam Senji Tharen'?

The song expresses deep romantic feelings and the joy of love, conveyed through poetic lyrics by Vairamuthu.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie 'Arul'?

In Arul, the song highlights a romantic moment between the lead characters, showcasing their emotional connection.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Hariharan and Sri Madhumitha.

Who composed the music for 'Ottiyanam Senji Tharen'?

The music for this beautiful song was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was the song released?

'Ottiyanam Senji Tharen' was released on May 1, 2004.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Arul, the song Ottiyanam Senji Tharen serves as a poignant expression of love and longing. The lyrics, penned by Vairamuthu, beautifully encapsulate the emotions of the characters as they navigate their romantic journey. With its soothing melody and heartfelt vocals, the song evokes a sense of warmth and tenderness. It is a perfect accompaniment to moments of celebration and intimacy, making it a cherished piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ottiyanam Senji Tharen from Arul is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance. With the soulful voices of Hariharan and Sri Madhumitha, this song is a perfect blend of heartfelt lyrics and enchanting melodies. Experience the magic of Vairamuthu's words set to Harrish Jeyaraj's captivating composition.
stanzaMeanings: I will take the ring, can I take a little from you?
Is it necessary to get the ring? Don't you have two hands to hold it?
With a nose ring, I will take a beautiful necklace and give it to you.
In the mouth, there is a beautiful person, but can you take the beauty from the one who is in love?
The silver chain is shining, turn back towards this person.
If you come here, this is Coimbatore's charm.
I will take the ring, can I take a little from you?
Is it necessary to get the ring? Don't you have two hands to hold it?
I will make a beautiful star shine and will you turn around?
There is no need for a star, and there is no need for a blue stone; can you keep the saffron on your forehead?
With your nose ring, I will pierce it; can I come?
Your nose ring is not for eating; can I come with a nose ring?
I will take the gold chain; will you come with me? Can you tell me what to do with the gold?
Is it necessary to get the ring? Don't you have two hands to hold it?
I will make a small bell ring; can you come with me?
You don't need to come to the gathering; your fingers are like a crab's claws.
I will take the ring from your hand and play with it.
Don't take the ring; just give me a little from your hand.
I will give you the gold chain; will you give me your hand?
I will take the ring, I will take the ring; I have made it.
Is it necessary to get the ring? Don't you have two hands to hold it?
With a nose ring, I will take a beautiful necklace and give it to you.
In the mouth, there is a beautiful person, but can you take the beauty from the one who is in love?
The silver chain is shining, turn back towards this person.
If you come here, this is Coimbatore's charm.
